start.txt: This clearing looks good. Let's take a moment to rest and figure out our next move.

lookAround.txt: I see some interesting things around here. What should we check out first?

choices.label: Look at the strange rock formation

rockFormation.txt: This rock formation is unusual... it almost looks like it was carved intentionally.

rockFormation2.txt: There might be some ancient markings here. This could be important!

oldRuins.txt: These ruins look ancient. I wonder what civilization built them...

oldRuins2.txt: There are some inscriptions I can't quite read. We should remember this location.

supplies.txt: I found some useful supplies! A first aid kit and some tools.

supplies2.txt: This will definitely help us on our journey. Good thinking!

afterInvestigation.txt: We should keep moving. There might be more dangers ahead, but we're better prepared now.
